style_summary: A raw hand-drawn fantasy poster system with oversized uneven lettering, neon marker mascot shapes, thick black outlines, loose scribble decorations, and dense childlike collage energy on a white paper field.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: White paper field with the image treated like a scanned handmade poster rather than a polished digital illustration.
Huge irregular hand-painted headline letters occupying the top or one dominant edge of the composition.
Thick, uneven, dry-brush black outlines around characters, props, text, and many decorative marks.
Flat marker-fill color blocks using electric cyan, saturated blue, hot pink, neon lime, deep green, and small brown or purple accents.
Childlike fantasy mascot anatomy with playful distortion, blunt legs, long ears, floating eyes, and simplified facial dots.
Dense doodle collage hierarchy with one oversized mascot and several smaller companion shapes clustered around it.
Rough handwritten micro-text, intentionally wobbly baselines, and imperfect spacing used as graphic texture.
Scribbled stars, loops, plant stems, orbit rings, arrows, patch shapes, and hand-drawn symbols scattered through open space.
Flat frontal or shallow side-view perspective with almost no realistic depth, cast shadows, gradients, or light modeling.
Visible marker streaks, naive scribble fills, slightly dirty scan texture, and rough line registration.
Playful dream-diary mood that feels invented, personal, and slightly nonsensical rather than commercially polished.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate the original blue long-eared animal shape.
Do not recreate the yellow bear-like figure, pink star figure, green heart emblem, or plant-in-mouth motif.
Do not use the original words, including fantasy, dream, fancy, whisper, magic words, or the bottom caption.
Do not include the social app header, username, follow button, phone status bar, watermark, creator signature, or platform UI.
Do not copy the exact character arrangement with a huge blue creature on the left and smaller figures on the right.
Do not recreate the original heart-and-globe symbol, brown step base, or exact bottom slogan placement.
Do not imitate a specific artist identity or add any creator attribution.
Do not turn the style into polished cartoon vector art, 3D mascot art, anime, comic panels, or photoreal illustration.

visual_deconstruction.overall_style_category: Naive marker-and-ink fantasy poster, scanned social-art energy, handmade doodle collage.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A single oversized mascot anchors the page, secondary creatures and props orbit around it, and large hand-painted text acts as a top-weighted frame.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: Subjects sit close to the viewer in a flat frontal plane, cropped or stretched to fill much of the page, with smaller supporting shapes tucked into remaining white space.
visual_deconstruction.perspective: Almost no linear perspective; characters and props are stacked like stickers on paper.
visual_deconstruction.texture: Dry black brush edges, marker streaks, scribbled interior fills, slightly uneven scan-like paper noise.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Dreamy, funny, strange, and emotionally direct, like a child-made fantasy poster with private symbols.

composition: Use one oversized main mascot or object as the visual anchor, taking roughly one third to one half of the frame.
Place the largest headline as a rough black hand-lettered band along the top, side, or bottom edge depending on aspect ratio.
Cluster two or three smaller companion doodles around the main subject without creating a realistic scene.
Keep visible white paper gaps, but fill them with stars, rings, tiny text, arrows, and scribbled symbols.
Use flat sticker-like stacking instead of natural perspective, shading, or a camera-like environment.
typography: Make the main text huge, black, irregular, brushy, and visibly hand-painted.
Use intentionally inconsistent letter sizes, tilted letters, uneven baseline, and rough ink edges.
Add smaller handwritten phrases as texture, using brown, green, black, or colored marker lines.
Let text behave like part of the drawing, not like clean graphic design typography.
Avoid exact source wording and avoid readable platform or creator identity.

color_palette.base: White paper background with black dry-brush outlines.
color_palette.behavior: Use high-saturation marker fills in large uneven patches, with color scribbles crossing inside outlines and small accents scattered like stickers.

image_treatment: Flat hand-drawn marker and ink look on white paper.
Rough black keylines should remain thick, uneven, and slightly dry.
Interior fills should show marker streaks, scratchy overdraw, and naive color overlaps.
No realistic lighting, no depth blur, no glossy rendering, and no smooth vector perfection.
The result should feel like a raw scanned poster, not a clean digital illustration.
design_rules: Keep style fidelity higher priority than content novelty: the output must stay in the same raw handmade visual family.
Change all literal subjects, phrases, symbols, and story details from the reference.
Use a dense but readable handmade hierarchy: giant title, oversized mascot, companion doodles, then micro-text and stars.
Make every outline feel drawn by hand with pressure changes, wobble, and imperfect closure.
Use nonsensical fantasy phrasing that is new to the case and not copied from the reference.
Let decorative marks feel spontaneous and uneven rather than symmetrically arranged.
do: Use white paper, thick black dry-brush outlines, neon marker fills, and wobbly handmade lettering.
Create new mascots, props, text, and story premises for every use.
Add scribbled stars, loops, plant-like stems, orbit rings, arrows, and small handwritten callouts.
Keep forms flat, frontal, naive, and slightly awkward.
Use a large headline as a drawing element rather than a clean font.
avoid: No platform UI, usernames, watermarks, signatures, QR codes, logos, or app chrome.
No original source text, original character silhouettes, original symbol cluster, or source story premise.
No polished vector cartoon, anime, 3D render, photorealism, smooth gradients, cinematic lighting, or clean commercial poster design.
No perfect typography, ruler-straight alignment, symmetrical icon systems, or sterile minimal layouts.
No over-detailed realistic environments, product photography, or comic-panel storytelling.
negative_prompt: platform UI, username, follow button, phone status bar, watermark, signature, QR code, logo, exact source wording, blue long-eared source creature, yellow bear source figure, pink star source figure, green heart source emblem, plant-in-mouth source motif, polished vector cartoon, anime, 3D render, photorealism, smooth gradient, cinematic lighting, clean commercial typography, perfect alignment, comic panels, realistic environment, product photo

values.SUBJECT: a crooked turquoise rocket-bird mascot with three tiny window eyes and noodle legs
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: marching sideways while releasing little seed comets
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a hand-drawn watering can shaped like a crescent moon
values.LOCATION: an imaginary garden parade drawn on blank white paper
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tiny sprouts, orbit rings, loose stars, bent arrows, two small pebble creatures, and scribbled blue puddles
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: raw mascot body with hot pink patches, green striped legs, and no realistic clothing
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: white scanned paper, huge rough black hand-lettering, thick dry-brush outlines, neon marker fills, childlike fantasy mascot anatomy, dense doodle collage, rough micro-text, scribbled stars and orbit rings, flat frontal perspective, visible marker streaks
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no original blue long-eared animal, no yellow bear figure, no pink star figure, no plant-in-mouth motif, no source text, no social app header, no original left-right arrangement
